error_signature: agent stopped due to max iterations
title: Infinite loop in sub-agent tool calls
symptom: The agent keeps calling the same tool repeatedly even after a successful response, eventually crashing with 'agent stopped due to max iterations'.
applies_when: Agent receives a successful response from the tool
not_this_if: Agent successfully returns a response without looping
root_cause: The agent's prompt instructions may not clearly indicate when to stop processing. If the prompt suggests that information is always missing, the agent will continue to loop instead of terminating after a successful tool call.
fix_steps: Add a clear instruction indicating when the agent should stop after a successful update
Test the agent to ensure it terminates correctly after success
agent_instruction: Modify the system prompt to include a clear stop condition after a successful tool call.
